title: MM Mateza stages talent competition
description: SCHOOL NEWS - MM Mateza Primary School in...
bodyText:
> The event was organised by the D-Lab Interns of the Inkcubeko Youth Centre, in partnership with the school, to create a platform on which every Grade Seven learner had the opportunity to showcase their uniqueness on stage.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
